descriptionShort: University of North Dakota hockey coach introduces six recruits, including Richmond Sockeyes forward McCormick.
descriptionLong: UND hockey coach Gasparini announces six new recruits for the 1987–88 season, emphasizing their size and skill. Among them is Dave McCormick, a 6-3, 215-pound Richmond Sockeyes forward who scored 26 goals and 24 assists in 51 regular-season games and has 15 goals in 13 playoff games. The Sockeyes are competing in Centennial Cup post-season play. Gasparini projects McCormick as a strong forward who can play multiple positions.

attribution.headline: UND Recruits Feature Size and Skill
